news-global-econ.title: Joy Alukkas expects gold price to rise amid global tensions
news-global-econ.description: “Over the next 2 to 3 years, without significant improvements in the US economy and global geopolitics, I don’t expect a meaningful correction, though dips may occur; the overall trend appears upward,” Chairman & MD, Joyalukkas Group

news-global-econ.title: Ayaan Hirsi Ali Warns Radical Islamist Networks Threaten The West
news-global-econ.description: Hoover Institute research fellow Ayaan Hirsi Ali warns that radical Islamist networks, driven out of the Middle East, are migrating to the West and posing a significant threat.

news-global-econ.title: Breitbart Business Digest: Wall Street Panickers Lose Again
news-global-econ.description:
The war may continue. But the market panic, at least for now, seems to be looking for an exit strategy.

news-global-econ.title: Fox News Poll: Voters give poor marks to economy, Congress and Trump
news-global-econ.description: Record 70% of voters disapprove of congressional Democrats as anger toward Washington hits new highs, Fox News poll shows sentiment shifting.

news-global-econ.title: Dem known for Trump impeachment disrupts GOP hearing on illegal immigrant truck licenses
news-global-econ.description: Rep. Thanedar, who filed Trump impeachment articles, accuses Republicans of scapegoating immigrants during House hearing on driving licenses.

news-korea-soc.title: Beyond the Iran Deal: Why Trump’s refusal to ‘kick the can’ just saved generations
news-korea-soc.description: Van Hipp makes the case that despite elite opposition and criticism Trump was right to reject the Iran Deal and take decisive military action to stop Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons.

news-thai-soc.title: Myanmar to curb private vehicle use as fuel shortages emerge
news-thai-soc.description: Myanmar’s military government will impose limits on private vehicles starting Saturday to conserve fuel as disruptions to Middle East shipping routes threaten the country’s energy supplies.

news-global-soc.title: Myanmar to curb private vehicle use as fuel shortages emerge
news-global-soc.description: Myanmar’s military government will impose limits on private vehicles starting Saturday to conserve fuel as disruptions to Middle East shipping routes threaten the country’s energy supplies.

news-global-soc.title: Russian crude oil cargoes swing back to India as Iran war hits supply
news-global-soc.description: Two Russian oil cargoes that had been signalling East Asia as a destination have switched to India, according to ship-tracking data, suggesting New Delhi is becoming more willing to take the crude as the Middle East conflict worsens.
